message:
Release v1.0.9: Code cleanup and maintenance

This maintenance release removes obsolete code and improves codebase cleanliness.

### Cleanup:
- Removed obsolete bash script cli/mcp-server-wrapper (dead code)
- Simplified MCP server architecture with single Node.js wrapper
- Eliminates confusion between duplicate wrapper implementations
- Improved maintainability with cleaner codebase

### Files Updated:
- CHANGELOG.md: Added v1.0.9 release notes
- package.json: Version 1.0.8 → 1.0.9
- .claude-plugin/plugin.json: Version 1.0.8 → 1.0.9
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json: Version 1.0.8 → 1.0.9
- superpowers-marketplace: Version 1.0.8 → 1.0.9

### Technical:
- Only cross-platform Node.js wrapper cli/mcp-server-wrapper.js remains
- All functionality preserved, no breaking changes
- Better maintainability with single MCP server entry point

Version: 1.0.8 → 1.0.9

@@ -5,6 +5,19 @@ All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
 The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
 and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).
 
+## [1.0.9] - 2025-10-31
+
+### Removed
+- **Dead code cleanup**: Removed obsolete bash script `cli/mcp-server-wrapper`
+  - Eliminates duplicate wrapper implementations
+  - Only Node.js cross-platform wrapper `mcp-server-wrapper.js` remains
+  - Prevents confusion about which wrapper to use
+  - Cleaner codebase with single MCP server entry point
+
+### Changed
+- Simplified MCP server architecture with single wrapper implementation
+- Improved maintainability by removing redundant bash script
+
 ## [1.0.8] - 2025-10-31
 
 ### Fixed
